LanguageData.TITAN_TitanTechBase.label: Titan Gene Engineering
LanguageData.TITAN_TitanTechBase.description: Understand the basic structure of Titan organisms, laying the foundation for further research.
LanguageData.TITAN_PlantTech.label: Titan Flora
LanguageData.TITAN_PlantTech.description: Study the seeds found on Prototype #0's fur to unlock Titan Tree cultivation and harvest Titan Tubers — a super ration.
LanguageData.TITAN_Tech_Destroyer.label: Crimson Mutagen
LanguageData.TITAN_Tech_Destroyer.description: Analyze the genetic data of Warlord to develop a mutagen that greatly enhances muscle and pain thresholds.
LanguageData.TITAN_Tech_Bastion.label: Void Mutagen
LanguageData.TITAN_Tech_Bastion.description: Analyze the phase-shift data of Void Walker to develop a mutagen capable of generating micro phase-deflection fields under the skin.
LanguageData.TITAN_Tech_Strider.label: Verdant Mutagen
LanguageData.TITAN_Tech_Strider.description: Analyze the vital data of Matriarch to develop a mutagen that greatly enhances metabolism and regeneration.
